response.global_analysis: 1. No JSON Reference Match: The official lyrics for 'Bouken! Shuppatsu!' were not available in the Reference JSON. 2. Manual Transcription: Completed a full manual transcription and translation of the song's vocals and Pekora's ending monologue. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely mapped to the musical vocal boundaries, ensuring a smooth reading experience that aligns perfectly with the performance and narration.

subtitles.original: 冒険！出発！さあ！挑戦！開始！さあ！
subtitles.english: Adventure! Off we go! Now, the challenge begins!

subtitles.original: 耳元からもぴょんぴょん　わくわく　頂点　上昇
subtitles.english: Even your ears are hopping, excitingly rising to the top!

subtitles.original: 冒険！出発！さあ！挑戦！開始！さあ！
subtitles.english: Adventure! Off we go! Now, the challenge begins!

subtitles.original: 水平線 向こうから 新天地 待っててね
subtitles.english: Beyond the horizon, a new world... please wait for us!

subtitles.original: 運命なんか飛び越してその先へ
subtitles.english: Jump over destiny and head beyond that!

subtitles.original: さあ！リアリティ ファンタジー 二つの狭間で
subtitles.english: Now! Reality and fantasy, between these two worlds,

subtitles.original: 夢歌え 声高く 一緒に さあ！
subtitles.english: sing your dreams, raise your voice, together now!

subtitles.original: まだ見ぬ世界へと君を連れて行くよ
subtitles.english: I'll take you to a world we have yet to see!

subtitles.original: みんなが繋がる物語 さあ始まるよ
subtitles.english: A story connecting everyone is about to begin!

subtitles.original: 冒険！出発！さあ！挑戦！開始！さあ！
subtitles.english: Adventure! Off we go! Now, the challenge begins!

subtitles.original: 冒険！出発！さあ！挑戦！開始！さあ！
subtitles.english: Adventure! Off we go! Now, the challenge begins!

subtitles.original: みんなの志 抱き いざ行こう 騎士団 集合！
subtitles.english: Holding everyone's ambition, let's go! Order of Knights, assemble!

subtitles.original: 冒険！出発！さあ！挑戦！開始！さあ！
subtitles.english: Adventure! Off we go! Now, the challenge begins!

subtitles.original: 胸に宿る太陽 風を切って さらに輝け
subtitles.english: With the sun in my heart, cutting through the wind, shine even brighter!

subtitles.original: 冒険！出発！さあ！挑戦！開始！さあ！
subtitles.english: Adventure! Off we go! Now, the challenge begins!

subtitles.original: 迷いと夢 晴天に掲げたら 突撃だ
subtitles.english: If we raise our doubts and dreams to the clear blue sky, it's time to charge!

subtitles.original: よって立つ この旅 見守って
subtitles.english: Please watch over this journey that we stand upon!

subtitles.original: さあ！リアリティ ファンタジー 二つの狭間で
subtitles.english: Now! Reality and fantasy, between these two worlds,

subtitles.original: 声上げて 向かえユートピアへ さあ！
subtitles.english: raise your voice and head towards Utopia, come on!

subtitles.original: それぞれの世界から 垣根を越えたら
subtitles.english: Once we cross the boundaries of our respective worlds,

subtitles.original: みんなが繋がる物語 さあ始まるよ
subtitles.english: a story connecting everyone is about to begin!

subtitles.original: 明るく陽気に荒波乗り越え ホロライブ！
subtitles.english: Cheerfully and brightly overcoming the rough waves, Hololive!

subtitles.original: 愛嬌開放うさ耳澄まして ホロライブ！
subtitles.english: Releasing charm, pricking up my rabbit ears, Hololive!

subtitles.original: 騎士道と誇り胸に刻んだら ホロライブ！
subtitles.english: Engraving chivalry and pride in my heart, Hololive!

subtitles.original: 神話に伝わる神秘な囁き ホロライブ！
subtitles.english: The mysterious whisper handed down in myths, Hololive!

subtitles.original: 冒険！出発！さあ！挑戦！開始！さあ！
subtitles.english: Adventure! Off we go! Now, the challenge begins!

subtitles.original: さあ！リアリティ ファンタジー 二つの狭間で
subtitles.english: Now! Reality and fantasy, between these two worlds,

subtitles.original: 夢歌え 声高く 一緒に さあ！
subtitles.english: sing your dreams, raise your voice, together now!

subtitles.original: まだ見ぬ世界へと君を連れて行くよ
subtitles.english: I'll take you to a world we have yet to see!

subtitles.original: 準備はほらできたよ
subtitles.english: Look, the preparations are all done,

subtitles.original: ルートの先 決まったよ
subtitles.english: and the route ahead is decided!

subtitles.original: みんなが繋がる物語 さあ始まるよ
subtitles.english: A story connecting everyone is about to begin!
The year is 2026!

subtitles.original: 2回目の3期生ライブ！
subtitles.english: The second 3rd-generation live concert!

subtitles.original: このチャンスを逃してなるものか！
subtitles.english: There's no way I'll let this chance slip away!

subtitles.original: 今こそ！
subtitles.english: Now is the time!

subtitles.original: 全人類兎化計画を...
subtitles.english: To carry out...

subtitles.original: 遂行する！
subtitles.english: ...the Operation Usagify All Humanity!
